title: Quantum Computing's Biggest IPO Ever Just Filed
script: Quantum computing just filed for the biggest IPO in the history of the technology. Quantinuum — spun out of Honeywell — is seeking $1.05 billion at a $12.7 billion valuation under ticker QNT on Nasdaq. The company uses trapped ions to build quantum computers that no one else can replicate. Revenue was just $30.9 million in 2025. Net loss: $136.6 million in just the first quarter of 2026. Wall Street is betting the breakthrough is worth the burn.
